International.name: Halloween
International.description: Halloween, also known as All Hallows' Eve, is celebrated on October 31st each year. It is a holiday that originated from ancient Celtic festivals, particularly the festival of Samhain, which marked the end of the harvest season and the beginning of winter. Halloween is characterized by activities such as trick-or-treating, costume parties, carving pumpkins into jack-o'-lanterns, and visiting haunted attractions. The holiday has evolved over time and is now widely celebrated in many countries around the world, with various customs and traditions associated with it.
